records.content_snippet:
.PHONY: up down build logs ps health init-db

up:
	cd deploy/docker && docker-compose up -d

down:
	cd deploy/docker && docker-compose down

build:
	cd deploy/docker && docker-compose build

logs:
	cd deploy/docker && docker-compose logs -f

ps:
	cd deploy/docker && docker-compose ps

health:
	python scripts/health_check.py

init-db:
	python scripts/init_db.py

restart-agent:
	cd deploy/docker && docker-compose restart agent_$(AGENT)

shell-orchestrator:
	cd deploy/docker && docker-compose exec orchestrator bash

shell-db:
	cd deploy/docker && docker-compose exec postgres psql -U elephant -d elephant
